task_completion.description: Read the safety directive text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor window showing the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/safety_directive_2026.txt being read.

task_completion.description: Log into the OpenMaint web application
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the OpenMaint interface (localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Update PM-ELEC-01 with Arc Flash PPE Category 4 and 90 min duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint edit screen or updated record view for PM-ELEC-01 showing 'Arc Flash PPE Category 4' in the description/warnings and the duration field set to 90.

task_completion.description: Update PM-CHILLER-01 with Lockout/Tagout procedures and 240 min duration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint edit screen or updated record view for PM-CHILLER-01 showing 'Lockout/Tagout' or 'LOTO' in the description/warnings and the duration field set to 240.

task_completion.description: Update PM-BOILER-01 with 20-25 PSI pressure requirement
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint edit screen or updated record view for PM-BOILER-01 showing '20-25 PSI' in the description or warning fields.
The OpenMaint edit screen or updated record view for PM-AHU-02 showing the duration field set to 60.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to make updates
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the OpenMaint web interface in a browser to edit records, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or psql) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent actually opened the safety directive file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the agent opening or printing the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/safety_directive_2026.txt, proving it didn't hallucinate the requirements.

integrity.description: Agent only modified the specified records
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should only be seen editing PM-ELEC-01, PM-CHILLER-01, PM-BOILER-01, and PM-AHU-02. No other PM records should be opened for editing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The safety directive specifies the following updates to Preventive Maintenance (PM) records: 1) PM-ELEC-01 requires Arc Flash PPE Category 4 and a duration of 90 minutes. 2) PM-CHILLER-01 requires Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures and a duration of 240 minutes. 3) PM-BOILER-01 requires a pressure specification of 20-25 PSI. 4) PM-AHU-02 requires a duration of 60 minutes. The agent must update these specific records in the OpenMaint GUI.
